solutionFiles.content:
pwd
ls media-archive
cd media-archive
pwd
mkdir -p organized/photos organized/documents backup review
touch review/needs-review.txt
ls organized review

solutionFiles.content:
echo "Community media archive" > organized/README.txt
echo "Photos go in organized/photos" >> organized/README.txt
echo "Documents go in organized/documents" >> organized/README.txt
echo "Check image names before publishing" > review/needs-review.txt
cat organized/README.txt
cat review/needs-review.txt

Community media archive
Photos go in organized/photos
Documents go in organized/documents
